case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JOSE FERNANDO SOBREVILLA AGUILERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BERNICE MEDINA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE FERNANDO SOBREVILLA AGUILERA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILERA, JOSE FERNANDO SOBREVILLA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILERA, JOSE FERNANDO SOBREVILLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
